<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/commonmark package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\CommonMark\Extension\TaskList; use League\CommonMark\Environment\EnvironmentBuilderInterface; use League\CommonMark\Extension\ExtensionInterface; final class TaskListExtension implements ExtensionInterface { public function register(EnvironmentBuilderInterface $environment): void { $environment->addInlineParser(new TaskListItemMarkerParser(), 35); $environment->addRenderer(TaskListItemMarker::class, new TaskListItemMarkerRenderer()); } }
